name: Blistered String Beans with Pork
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Szechuan mustard green, finely minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the string beans and break off the ends; dry them thoroughly to reduce spattering during deep-frying.
2. Mince the Szechuan mustard green.
3. Wash the dried shrimp and soak them in sherry for 1 hour. Drain the shrimp, reserving the sherry.
4. Mix the reserved sherry with chicken broth, water, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Set aside.
5. Heat the oil in a wok (or deep pan) until a bamboo chopstick sizzles when inserted into the oil.
6. Deep fry the string beans in 5 or 6 batches, until they develop brown blisters and shrivel slightly. Remove each batch, drain, and keep warm.
7. Remove all but 2 tablespoons of oil from the wok and heat until very hot.
8. Add the ground pork and stir-fry until broken up into small pieces and no longer pink.
9. Add the minced shrimp and Szechuan mustard green; stir for 30 seconds.
10. Add the string beans and stir to mix well for about 15 seconds.
11. Pour in the reserved liquid ingredients and toss until reduced to 2 tablespoons.
12. Serve on a warmed platter.
